since_last: 30% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.12%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.18% · BTC -0.35% · Gold -1.14% · Nasdaq100 -1.11%. 30% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.12%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.12%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -8.87%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.78%, ISRG +3.02%, BIDU +2.85%, ZBRA +2.31%, INTU +2.10%. Laggards: SKHY -8.87%, SMR -8.55%, OKLO -8.40%, CEVA -7.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.68% at $134.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.68% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
